features: ULTRA-GLOSSY TINTED LIP OIL: Drench lips in an addictive sheer wash of ultra-glossy colour with this revitalising tinted lip oil.
NON-STICKY FORMULA: The ultra-plush, XXL applicator slicks on a comfortable, non-sticky formula with a fresh minty scent.
INFUSED WITH NOURISHING INGREDIENTS: Infused with nourishing oils such as apricot oil, avocado oil, jojoba oil and pomegranate oil.
MULTI-PURPOSE: Can be worn on its own or over lipstick.

SKIN-LOVING INGREDIENTS: All e.l.f. products are made from skin-loving ingredients you want, minus the toxins you don’t—all at good-for-you prices. All e.l.f. products are 100% Cruelty-Free and Vegan.
description: Product Description "Drench lips in an addictive wash of glossy colour with e.l.f. Cosmetics Glow Reviver Lip Oil Glimmer. Take your pick and use the XXL, ultra-plush applicator to slick on your fave nourishing formula that looks and feels e.l.f.ing gorgeous. All e.l.f. products are free from phthalates, parabens, nonylphenol ethoxylates, triclosan, triclocarban, and hydroquinone. e.l.f. is proud to partner with Fair Trade USA™ and manufacture products in Fair Trade Certified™ facilities. Look for the Fair Trade Certified™ seal on your e.l.f. product! e.l.f. stands with every eye, lip, face, paw and fin. Proudly vegan, cruelty-free and Leaping Bunny Certified." Directions Apply using the included XXL, ultra-plush applicator for a glossy finish. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid eye contact. Keep away from open flames and direct heat sources.
